## Code Review Request

### Target Code
- **File(s)**: <!-- e.g., src/components/atoms/Button/Button.tsx -->
- **Component/Function**: <!-- e.g., Button component -->
- **Current Status**: <!-- Working | Buggy | Needs improvement -->

### Review Focus Areas
- [ ] Code quality and best practices
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Accessibility improvements  
- [ ] TypeScript type safety
- [ ] Error handling enhancement
- [ ] Design system compliance
- [ ] Testing coverage gaps

### Specific AI Assistance Needed

**Code Quality**:
- [ ] Refactor complex functions
- [ ] Improve variable naming
- [ ] Add missing documentation
- [ ] Optimize component structure

**Accessibility**:
- [ ] Add missing ARIA attributes  
- [ ] Improve keyboard navigation
- [ ] Enhance screen reader support
- [ ] Fix color contrast issues

**Performance**:
- [ ] Optimize re-renders
- [ ] Improve bundle size
- [ ] Add memoization where needed
- [ ] Review dependency usage

**Testing**:
- [ ] Add missing test cases
- [ ] Improve test quality
- [ ] Add accessibility tests
- [ ] Add integration tests

### Current Code Issues
<!-- Describe specific problems with current code -->

### Expected Improvements
<!-- Describe what improvements you expect AI to suggest -->

### AI Prompt Suggestions
```
Example prompt:
"Review this [ComponentName] component for accessibility, performance, and code quality issues. Suggest specific improvements for [focus areas]. Maintain existing functionality while improving [specific aspects]."
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All identified issues addressed
- [ ] Performance metrics improved
- [ ] Accessibility compliance verified
- [ ] Test coverage increased
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Breaking changes avoided (if applicable)

<!-- Any other information that would help with the review -->
